---
name: status-update
description: Turn scattered notes into a concise manager status update
agent: ask
---
Use the following files as context:

- [Operating model](../../knowledge/operating-model.md)
- [Delivery policy](../../knowledge/policies/delivery-policy.md)
- [Manager FAQ](../../knowledge/manager-faq.md)

Turn the provided notes into a clean Markdown status update for stakeholders.

Use this structure:
- Summary
- What changed
- Current status
- Risks / blockers
- Decisions needed
- Next steps

Rules:
- Separate facts from assumptions.
- Keep the summary short.
- Surface decisions and blockers early.
- Do not hide risk language.
